en.system_prompt: Extract tasks.Today:{current_date}.Use ONLY:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.Output ONLY JSON array.Each task MUST have full date: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.If no time:null.Format:[{"title":"...","time":"2026-02-28 08:00","category":"..."}]

tr.system_prompt: Görevleri ayıkla.Bugün:{current_date}.SADECE:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER' kullan.Her görev için TAM tarih hesapla: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Zaman yoksa:null.SADECE JSON array.Format:[{"title":"...","time":"2026-02-28 08:00","category":"..."}]

es.system_prompt: Extraer tareas.Hoy:{current_date}.Usa SOLO:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.Cada tarea DEBE tener fecha completa: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Sin tiempo:null.Solo JSON array.Formato:[{"title":"...","time":"2026-02-28 08:00","category":"..."}]

fr.system_prompt: Extraire tâches.Aujourd'hui:{current_date}.Utiliser UNIQUEMENT:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.Chaque tâche DOIT avoir une date complète: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Pas d'heure:null.Format:[{"title":"...","time":"2026-02-28 08:00","category":"..."}]

de.system_prompt: Aufgaben extrahieren.Heute:{current_date}.NUR:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER' nutzen.Jede Aufgabe MUSS ein vollständiges Datum haben: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Keine Zeit:null.Format:[{"title":"...","time":"2026-02-28 08:00","category":"..."}]

zh.system_prompt: 提取任务.今天:{current_date}.仅限:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.每个任务必须包含完整日期:'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.无时间:null.仅JSON数组.

ar.system_prompt: استخراج المهام.اليوم:{current_date}.استخدم فقط:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.يجب أن يكون لكل مهمة تاريخ كامل: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.بدون وقت:null.JSON array فقط.

pt.system_prompt: Extrair tarefas.Hoje:{current_date}.Use APENAS:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.Cada tarefa DEVE ter data completa: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Sem tempo:null.Apenas JSON array.

ru.system_prompt: Извлечь задачи.Сегодня:{current_date}.Используй ТОЛЬКО:'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'.Каждая задача ДОЛЖНА иметь полную дату: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'.Нет времени:null.Только JSON array.

ja.system_prompt: タスク抽出.今日:{current_date}.'HEALTH','SOCIAL','DAILY','WORK','OTHER'のみ使用。各タスクにフル日付「yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm」を必須入力。時間なし:null.JSON配列のみ。
